sales-forecasting.title: AI Sales Forecasting Workflow Diagnosis
sales-forecasting.metaDescription: Reduce forecast preparation from 7–8 days to a same-day operating brief. Kautilyan diagnoses sales forecasting and demand coordination on your existing ERP, CRM, and field systems.
sales-forecasting.headline: Your forecast shouldn't take a week to assemble.
sales-forecasting.lede: When numbers live in the ERP and context lives in WhatsApp, email, and field judgment, leadership waits 7–8 days for a usable forecast. We map that workflow and prove value in 45 days.
sales-forecasting.situation: Your monthly forecast takes days because inputs come from field teams, dealers, CRM, ERP, Excel, WhatsApp, and finance reviews - all manually coordinated by two or three people who chase context across every channel.
does: Detects signals daily from connected sources - field inputs, order patterns, variance flags
Identifies missing inputs and routes follow-up automatically
Explains variance between forecast and actuals with evidence
Drafts a forecast brief with context assembled - for human review and approval
Captures every decision and override as reusable learning
sales-forecasting.proofMetric: Reduce forecast preparation cycle from 7–8 days to same-day operating brief.
sales-forecasting.forWho: Sales heads, commercial leads, and CIOs at manufacturing, distribution, and B2B services companies.

revenue-leakage.title: Revenue Leakage & Follow-Up Intelligence
revenue-leakage.metaDescription: Stop silent deals and late renewal risk. Kautilyan diagnoses revenue leakage workflows across CRM, email, and field judgment - with a named proof metric in 45 days.
revenue-leakage.headline: Revenue leaks in the gaps between systems.
revenue-leakage.lede: The CRM tracks stages, but competitor risk, discount logic, and next-best action still wait on one senior person. We redesign that workflow with governed AI on your existing stack.
revenue-leakage.situation: Opportunities go silent. Follow-ups are missed. Renewal risks surface too late. Nobody owns the next action until the quarter is already leaking - and recovery is expensive.
does: Watches relationship signals across email, CRM, and communication patterns
Detects accounts where activity is declining or at risk
Drafts next-best-action recommendations for human review
Routes ownership of at-risk accounts with clear accountability
Captures every escalation and resolution as pattern learning
revenue-leakage.proofMetric: All high-risk open accounts flagged, assigned, and actioned within a defined SLA.
revenue-leakage.forWho: Sales leaders, heads of key accounts, and COOs at B2B companies with distributed sales teams.

leadership-reporting.title: Leadership Reporting & Ops Intelligence
leadership-reporting.metaDescription: Cut weekly reporting prep with AI workflow transformation. Kautilyan diagnoses leadership reporting workflows on your existing BI, ERP, and ops tools.
leadership-reporting.headline: Dashboards show what happened. Leaders still need someone to assemble what matters.
leadership-reporting.lede: Teams spend hours chasing updates, validating numbers, and preparing decks. By the time leadership sees a brief, the moment has passed. We fix the workflow - not just the report format.
leadership-reporting.situation: Teams spend hours every week chasing updates, validating numbers, preparing decks, and explaining variances. By the time the report reaches leadership, the moment has already passed.
does: Captures signals from connected systems daily - no manual aggregation
Validates numbers against source systems and flags discrepancies
Summarises exceptions and variances with evidence
Drafts an executive brief with decisions pending, risks flagged, and actions needed
Tracks what leadership acts on - to improve the next brief
leadership-reporting.proofMetric: Reduce weekly reporting preparation effort by a named percentage and improve response time to operational signals.
leadership-reporting.forWho: COOs, IT heads, and operations leads where leadership visibility depends on manual coordination.
